tasks.title: Define default goal workflow configuration for first successful run
tasks.details: Establish hub-owned defaults for planning, routing, verification and artifact generation so a single goal can be processed without mandatory preconfiguration.

tasks.title: Add system readiness check for goal-first happy path
tasks.details: Expose whether the current hub and available workers are sufficient for the default goal flow, including degraded-mode hints when optional capabilities are missing.

tasks.title: Implement fallback planning and execution defaults when advanced config is absent
tasks.details: Ensure the hub can choose safe planning and routing defaults when teams, worker capabilities or advanced overrides are not explicitly configured. Depends on BE-DEF-681 and BE-DEF-682.

tasks.title: Expose default-versus-override provenance in goal workflow responses
tasks.details: Return which planning, routing, policy and verification settings came from defaults and which came from explicit overrides so simple usage remains transparent.

tasks.title: Introduce persistent Goal entity in hub storage
tasks.details: Add GoalDB and GoalRepository in the hub with status, source, summary and timestamps. Keep task ownership in the hub and do not move orchestration into workers.

tasks.title: Link goals to plans tasks artifacts and traces
tasks.details: Add additive foreign-key or reference fields so a goal can be traced to downstream plan nodes, tasks, artifacts and pipeline traces. Depends on BE-GOAL-701.

tasks.title: Add additive goal ingestion API for simple goal submission
tasks.details: Create POST /goals with minimal goal payload and compatibility-safe response fields. Keep existing task APIs unchanged.

tasks.title: Support advanced goal submission fields without breaking simple flow
tasks.details: Add optional constraints, acceptance criteria, execution preferences and visibility flags to goal ingestion. Simple clients can still submit only a plain goal string. Depends on BE-GOAL-703.

tasks.title: Introduce persisted Plan and PlanNode entities in hub
tasks.details: Create hub-owned plan storage for plan headers and graph nodes so generated plans can be inspected and re-materialized. Depends on BE-GOAL-701.

tasks.title: Extract reusable hub PlanningService from auto planner flow
tasks.details: Refactor goal decomposition logic behind a PlanningService used by both new goal endpoints and existing auto-planner routes. Preserve legacy behavior through adapters.

tasks.title: Generate traceable task graphs from goals
tasks.details: Produce stable plan node ids, dependencies and rationale metadata before task materialization. Keep graph generation in the hub only. Depends on BE-PLAN-711 and BE-PLAN-712.

tasks.title: Add plan inspection and adjustment APIs
tasks.details: Expose GET /goals/<id>/plan and additive PATCH endpoints for hub-approved node edits before execution. Preserve transparency by returning generated rationale and dependency metadata. Depends on BE-PLAN-713.

tasks.title: Add capability metadata to worker registration model
tasks.details: Extend worker registration with additive fields for supported roles, skills and execution limits. Existing workers should continue to register without these fields.

tasks.title: Normalize worker role taxonomy for planner researcher coder reviewer tester
tasks.details: Define optional worker role values and capability mapping for hub-side routing. Do not allow workers to orchestrate each other.

tasks.title: Implement capability-based worker selection in hub routing
tasks.details: Use task kind and required capabilities when the hub selects a worker. Fall back safely to current routing if capability metadata is absent. Depends on BE-WORK-721 and BE-WORK-722.

tasks.title: Preserve explicit worker override and advanced routing controls
tasks.details: Keep manual worker pinning and advanced routing configuration available in task assignment and orchestration APIs while adding capability-based defaults. Depends on BE-WORK-723.

tasks.title: Add execution scope metadata to tasks and plan nodes
tasks.details: Introduce additive execution_scope fields describing repo, branch, workspace mode and isolation requirements. Keep current task execution compatible.

tasks.title: Implement hub-managed isolated workspace lifecycle records
tasks.details: Track workspace allocation, preparation and cleanup per execution attempt without assuming shared state across containers. Depends on BE-EXEC-731.

tasks.title: Record container-aware execution lease and cleanup states
tasks.details: Persist which container and workspace lease handled a task execution so failures can be retried or escalated predictably. Depends on BE-EXEC-732.

tasks.title: Expose execution scope and workspace metadata in execution APIs
tasks.details: Return execution scope, workspace id and lifecycle status through additive response fields and read models. Depends on BE-EXEC-733.

tasks.title: Add verification specification model for lint test and policy gates
tasks.details: Represent verification requirements as structured hub-owned metadata attached to tasks or plan nodes. Keep verification inspectable and configurable.

tasks.title: Implement hub-side verification orchestration after task execution
tasks.details: Let the hub enqueue or trigger verification work after execution while workers still only perform delegated verification tasks. Depends on BE-VERIFY-741.

tasks.title: Add repair retry and escalation state machine for failed verification
tasks.details: Persist retry counts, repair attempts and escalation reasons so failed gates remain observable and controllable. Depends on BE-VERIFY-742.

tasks.title: Persist policy decision records before delegation and execution
tasks.details: Store hub policy decisions, reasons and rule versions before work is routed to a worker. Keep governance explainable and auditable.

tasks.title: Enforce capability and policy checks in hub assignment flow
tasks.details: Validate worker capabilities, execution scope and policy gates before dispatching work. Do not move any governance logic into workers. Depends on BE-WORK-723 and BE-POL-751.

tasks.title: Add explainable governance summary for each goal execution
tasks.details: Produce a concise hub-generated summary of approvals, policy checks, blocked actions and escalation reasons so governance is visible even in the simple goal flow. Depends on BE-POL-751 and BE-POL-752.

tasks.title: Define security baseline for goal planning execution and artifact flows
tasks.details: Document and encode minimum security requirements for every new goal workflow step including auth, authorization, audit, least privilege and safe defaults.

tasks.title: Add capability-scoped authorization checks for new goal and plan APIs
tasks.details: Ensure goal submission, plan editing, artifact retrieval and override actions are individually authorized and auditable. Depends on BE-GOAL-703 and BE-PLAN-714.

tasks.title: Apply artifact and trace access controls with least-privilege defaults
tasks.details: Protect artifacts, execution traces and verification records so simple result views are safe by default while advanced inspection remains available to authorized users. Depends on BE-ART-762 and BE-OBS-763.

tasks.title: Add tamper-evident audit coverage for goal plan policy and verification events
tasks.details: Record critical goal workflow decisions and transitions in audit logs with enough integrity metadata to support later review. Depends on BE-POL-751 and BE-VERIFY-743.

tasks.title: Introduce structured Artifact entity linked to goals plans and tasks
tasks.details: Add artifact records for reports, code outputs, analyses and verification summaries. Link them back to hub-owned goal and task lineage.

tasks.title: Add additive artifact ingestion and retrieval APIs
tasks.details: Expose endpoints to attach and fetch artifacts without changing current task payload shapes. Keep simple result access and detailed trace access both possible. Depends on BE-ART-761.

tasks.title: Propagate trace ids across goal plan task execution and artifact flows
tasks.details: Extend existing pipeline trace support so all hub orchestration stages and worker executions share a trace id lineage. Depends on BE-GOAL-702 and BE-ART-761.

tasks.title: Persist inspectable model routing decisions per planning and execution step
tasks.details: Record which LLM backend was selected, why it was chosen and which policy version applied. Keep routing decisions visible through API responses and traces.

tasks.title: Separate task working context from project knowledge sources
tasks.details: Introduce explicit boundaries between short-lived task context, goal context and durable project knowledge or RAG inputs. Keep both visible and configurable.

tasks.title: Add feature flag for goal workflow and persisted plans
tasks.details: Gate new goal and plan persistence paths behind additive configuration so rollout can remain incremental and reversible.

tasks.title: Add compatibility adapter from existing auto planner route to goal planning service
tasks.details: Route /tasks/auto-planner/plan through the new hub planning service while preserving current request and response shapes. Depends on BE-PLAN-712 and BE-MIG-772.

tasks.title: Add contract tests and migration docs for legacy task clients
tasks.details: Cover compatibility with existing task flows and document how goals, plans and artifacts can be adopted incrementally without forcing immediate client updates. Depends on BE-MIG-773.

tasks.title: Formalize hub-as-worker fallback policy in orchestration layer
tasks.details: Define explicit hub fallback rules: delegate when possible, execute locally only when no suitable worker is available or local execution is explicitly permitted. Keep the hub as control plane even when it acts as worker.

tasks.title: Unify hub local worker identity across registration routing and execution paths
tasks.details: Ensure the hub uses one consistent local worker identity and URL across registration, auto-assignment, delegation fallback, autopilot and readiness reporting. Avoid ambiguous dual identities for the same hub instance. Depends on BE-HUB-781.

tasks.title: Apply the same capability and policy checks to hub self-execution as to remote workers
tasks.details: When the hub executes as worker fallback, run identical capability, policy, security and governance checks before assignment or execution. Do not create a less-governed bypass path for local execution. Depends on BE-WORK-723, BE-POL-751 and BE-HUB-781.

tasks.title: Expose delegation-versus-local-execution provenance in task and goal traces
tasks.details: Record whether work was delegated to a remote worker or executed by the hub as fallback, including the reason why fallback was chosen. Keep this inspectable in APIs, traces and audit records. Depends on BE-HUB-781 and BE-POL-751.

tasks.title: Add configuration guardrails for when hub self-execution is allowed
tasks.details: Introduce explicit configuration for hub self-execution modes such as disabled, fallback-only or always-eligible-for-specific-task-kinds. Default to least surprise and keep overrides visible. Depends on BE-HUB-781.

tasks.title: Add goal submission view with simple and advanced modes
tasks.details: Create a frontend entry flow where users can submit a simple goal first and optionally expand advanced fields such as constraints, acceptance criteria and routing preferences. The default state should require only a goal and should rely on safe system defaults. Depends on BE-GOAL-703, BE-GOAL-704 and BE-DEF-681.

tasks.title: Add goal detail page with linked plan task artifact trace sections
tasks.details: Provide a goal detail view that surfaces summary results first while keeping linked plan nodes, tasks, artifacts and trace ids inspectable. Depends on BE-GOAL-702, BE-PLAN-714 and BE-ART-762.

tasks.title: Add plan inspection and adjustment UI for hub-generated plans
tasks.details: Allow users to inspect generated plan graphs and make hub-approved refinements before execution. Keep advanced control explicit and reversible. Depends on BE-PLAN-714.

tasks.title: Expose policy routing and verification details in advanced frontend panels
tasks.details: Surface routing reasons, policy decisions, security checks, verification gates and retry state in advanced drawers or tabs without cluttering the default result flow. Depends on BE-VERIFY-743, BE-POL-752, BE-POL-753 and BE-ROUTE-764.

tasks.title: Add artifact-first result summary with drill-down into execution trace
tasks.details: Show user-facing outcome summaries from artifacts while preserving drill-down access to execution records, tasks and detailed traces. Depends on BE-ART-762 and BE-OBS-763.

tasks.title: Add first-run guidance for goal-only usage and advanced reveal points
tasks.details: Guide new users toward the simple goal-only path while clearly indicating where advanced configuration, governance and trace inspection can be opened on demand. Depends on FE-GOAL-781 and BE-DEF-684.

tasks.title: Add repository tests for Goal and Plan persistence models
tasks.details: Cover create read update lifecycle for GoalDB, PlanDB and PlanNodeDB plus traceable linkage fields. Depends on BE-GOAL-701 and BE-PLAN-711.

tasks.title: Add contract tests for additive goal and plan APIs
tasks.details: Validate backward-compatible responses for POST /goals, GET /goals/<id>/plan and related inspection endpoints without breaking existing task clients. Depends on BE-GOAL-703 and BE-PLAN-714.

tasks.title: Add orchestration tests for capability-based routing and policy enforcement
tasks.details: Verify the hub selects workers based on capabilities, records policy decisions and never allows worker-to-worker orchestration. Depends on BE-WORK-723 and BE-POL-752.

tasks.title: Add execution isolation and workspace lifecycle tests
tasks.details: Cover execution_scope metadata, workspace lease records, cleanup states and retry behavior across separate hub and worker container assumptions. Depends on BE-EXEC-734.

tasks.title: Add verification and artifact traceability end-to-end tests
tasks.details: Exercise goal to plan to task to verification to artifact lineage including trace ids, audit records, security enforcement and inspectable result retrieval. Depends on BE-VERIFY-743, BE-ART-762, BE-OBS-763 and BE-SEC-773.

tasks.title: Add frontend end-to-end tests for simple and advanced goal UX
tasks.details: Cover simple goal submission, advanced goal refinement, plan inspection and detailed policy or verification drill-down in the frontend. Depends on FE-GOAL-781 through FE-GOAL-786.

tasks.title: Add first-run happy-path tests with default configuration only
tasks.details: Verify that a new installation can process a goal with only the default configuration and still produce traceable planning, execution and result metadata. Depends on BE-DEF-683 and FE-GOAL-786.

tasks.title: Add security regression tests for goal plan artifact and trace endpoints
tasks.details: Cover authorization boundaries, least-privilege defaults and audit generation across all new goal-first APIs and views. Depends on BE-SEC-772 through BE-SEC-774.

tasks.title: Add orchestration tests for hub-as-worker fallback behavior
tasks.details: Verify the hub delegates whenever suitable remote workers exist, falls back to local execution only when allowed, records fallback provenance and never creates worker-to-worker orchestration side paths. Depends on BE-HUB-782 through BE-HUB-785.

tasks.title: Update root README with goal-based product direction and migration path
tasks.details: Describe the new goal to plan to task to execution to verification to artifacts flow, highlight goal-only first use with default settings and state that legacy task APIs remain supported.

tasks.title: Document goal and plan APIs in backend and operator guides
tasks.details: Add request and response examples, advanced option fields and compatibility notes for operators and integrators. Depends on BE-GOAL-703, BE-GOAL-704 and BE-PLAN-714.

tasks.title: Document worker capability routing and policy explainability model
tasks.details: Explain how the hub selects workers, applies policy checks and keeps routing or governance decisions inspectable without changing hub-worker boundaries. Depends on BE-WORK-723 and BE-POL-752.

tasks.title: Document artifact result views and traceability model
tasks.details: Show how simple result summaries map to detailed artifacts, traces, verification records and execution history. Depends on BE-ART-762 and BE-OBS-763.

tasks.title: Document incremental adoption strategy from tasks to goals
tasks.details: Describe feature flags, compatibility adapters and coexistence rules for older task-driven clients during gradual rollout. Depends on BE-MIG-772 through BE-MIG-774.

tasks.title: Document security defaults and governance visibility for goal-first usage
tasks.details: Explain the secure defaults, authorization model, audit coverage and where users can inspect policy or verification details during simple and advanced usage. Depends on BE-POL-753 and BE-SEC-774.

tasks.title: Document hub-as-worker fallback semantics and operator controls
tasks.details: Explain when the hub may execute work itself, how fallback is configured, how provenance is surfaced and how operators can keep governance and transparency intact. Depends on BE-HUB-785.

tasks.title: Extend architecture docs with Goal Plan Task Execution Verification Artifact model
tasks.details: Capture the target backend domain model and responsibility boundaries while keeping the hub as control plane and workers as delegated executors.

tasks.title: Add sequence diagrams for goal ingestion planning delegation and verification
tasks.details: Model how goals move through hub planning, worker execution and hub verification without introducing worker-to-worker coordination.

tasks.title: Document execution isolation and container boundary assumptions
tasks.details: Describe workspace lifecycle, execution scopes and hub-worker container interactions without shared-state assumptions. Depends on BE-EXEC-734.

tasks.title: Document context separation between task context and project knowledge
tasks.details: Clarify how short-lived task context, goal context and durable knowledge sources are separated and surfaced for inspection. Depends on BE-CTX-771.

tasks.title: Document observability model for traces audits routing and policy records
tasks.details: Define how trace ids, audit logs, routing decisions and verification evidence connect across the complete goal workflow. Depends on BE-OBS-763 and BE-POL-751.

tasks.title: Document default-first UX architecture with advanced-step disclosure
tasks.details: Capture how the system supports a single-goal first-use flow while preserving advanced controls, governance visibility, security and full traceability.

tasks.title: Update architecture docs for delegate-first hub with worker fallback
tasks.details: Clarify that the hub remains control plane and delegates by default, but may act as worker fallback when delegation is not possible. Document the decision points, safety constraints and observability requirements. Depends on BE-HUB-781 and BE-HUB-784.
